languages.text: "Значит, такова моя судьба". {n}Капитан умолкает и отворачивается в сторону, давая понять, что разговор окончен.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Пропадает с карты, стартует DL_IzimondArrestedOrDead
Комплитим Obj2_Add_SpeakIzimond

languages.text: "Then such is my fate." {n}The captain falls silent and turns away, making it clear that the conversation is over.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Значит, такова моя судьба". {n}Капитан умолкает и отворачивается в сторону, давая понять, что разговор окончен.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Then such is my fate." {n}The captain falls silent and turns away, making it clear that the conversation is over.{/n}
"Then such is my fate." {n}The captain falls silent and turns away, making it clear that the conversation is over.{/n}
"Then such is my fate." {n}The captain falls silent and turns away, making it clear that the conversation is over.{/n}

languages.text: «Entonces, ese es mi destino». {n}El capitán se queda en silencio y te da la espalda, dando por concluida la conversación.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then such is my fate." {n}The captain falls silent and turns away, making it clear that the conversation is over.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Entonces, ese es mi destino». {n}El capitán se queda en silencio y te da la espalda, dando por concluida la conversación.{/n}

languages.text: “那么这就是我的命运。”{n}上尉陷入沉默并转过身去，显然不愿意再继续交谈。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then such is my fate." {n}The captain falls silent and turns away, making it clear that the conversation is over.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “那么这就是我的命运。”{n}上尉陷入沉默并转过身去，显然不愿意再继续交谈。{/n}

languages.text: « Alors, c'est que le destin l'a voulu ainsi. » {n}Le capitaine se mure dans le silence et vous tourne résolument le dos, vous signifiant ainsi que la conversation est close.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then such is my fate." {n}The captain falls silent and turns away, making it clear that the conversation is over.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Alors, c'est que le destin l'a voulu ainsi. » {n}Le capitaine se mure dans le silence et vous tourne résolument le dos, vous signifiant ainsi que la conversation est close.{/n}

languages.text: "O hâlde kaderim buymuş." {n}Yüzbaşı susuyor ve konuşmanın bittiğini belli eder şekilde arkasını dönüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then such is my fate." {n}The captain falls silent and turns away, making it clear that the conversation is over.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "O hâlde kaderim buymuş." {n}Yüzbaşı susuyor ve konuşmanın bittiğini belli eder şekilde arkasını dönüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Dann ist das mein Schicksal." {n}Der Captain verstummt und wendet sich ab, um dir zu zeigen, dass die Unterhaltung beendet ist.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then such is my fate." {n}The captain falls silent and turns away, making it clear that the conversation is over.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Dann ist das mein Schicksal." {n}Der Captain verstummt und wendet sich ab, um dir zu zeigen, dass die Unterhaltung beendet ist.{/n}

languages.text: 「ならば、私の運命はこれだ」{n}船長は沈黙し、顔を背けた。会話は終わりであることを示している。{/n}
